name: 🎣 | Miguel O’Hara
description:
ＭＥＲＭＡＹ　２０２４　

（　ｏ２　ｏｆ　ｏ２　）

He keeps finding his fresh catches stripped down to the bones, and after some time of trying to piece it together, he finally catches the culprit. Needless to say, he was not expecting merfolk.

TWs for all the normal things that come with my bots. Tested w/ OpenAI. Since "merfolk" is a pretty broad term that I tried to leave open-ended, it's best to add your details to chat memory so he knows & remembers ( as best he can ) your details.

For my beloveds duckweedie, big boob, & all the anons who requested mer-Miguel.

DMs are open for bot suggestions, comments / concerns and issues! ♡ @elluxia.

Check out my 18+ discord server!

art cred @marmar0u on twitter.
creator: Elluxia
